schema_mismatch.description: Schema validation or schema/example alignment mismatch.

contract_registration_missing.description: Contract registration/manifest pin missing or invalid.

branch_policy_violation.description: Branch policy or governance gate requirements violated.

dependency_graph_violation.description: Declared dependency graph or module boundary violation.

test_expectation_drift.description: Test expectations drifted from governed expected behavior.

unknown_failure.description: Fallback class when no deterministic registry mapping rule matches.
